top_signals.title: Gold price falls nearly 2% as rebound proves short-lived
top_signals.summary: Since the war started in late February, bullion has fallen by more than 22%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: IRS says Trump Account contributions will not trigger gift tax reporting
top_signals.summary: Parents, guardians and others who contribute to a Trump Account will not be required to file a gift tax return, the IRS and Treasury Department said Monday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
